name: logistics carriers managing 10-50 daily deliveries tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 10-50 daily deliveries, inefficient tracking causes missed delivery deadlines. We consolidate daily delivery logs instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of driver performance leading to missed delivery deadlines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient tracking of driver performance leading to missed delivery deadlines.
